seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The phrase "thank you for the opportunity" must appear at least twice in the email.
new_constraint: Refrain from using the phrase "thank you for the opportunity."
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The phrase "thank you for the opportunity" must appear at least twice in the email. Refrain from using the phrase "thank you for the opportunity."
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Day of Employment Date].

This was not an easy decision, as I have genuinely appreciated my time here. I am very grateful for the professional development and experiences I've gained during my tenure with the company. I sincerely value the chances I've been given.

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition during my remaining weeks. Please let me know how I can best assist in wrapping up my current projects and training my replacement.

Again, I am appreciative of the opportunities provided to me at [Company Name]. I wish you and the entire team nothing but continued success in the future.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<turn|>
